title: Health Sciences Education Platform Elsevier OSMOSIS MD
content:
Health Sciences Education Platform Elsevier OSMOSIS MD

Dear Students,

The

Elsevier

OSMOSIS MD

database subscription, a medical and health sciences education platform

comprising

educational videos, flashcards, exam questions and other tools to support your learning experience

is accessible.

Please

CLICK HERE

to access the platform.

Sign in using your institutional email address.

Sincerely.
